calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Civil Harassment TRO & OSC Hearing
Dept. 514, Judge Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Juanita Murphy, CSR: Teanna L. Ward #11918.
Petitioner Hui Oiong Xie present with counsel Akiko Takeshita. Also present Cantonese interpreter Norah Uydea.
Respondent Edgar Leung present with counsel Robert O. Morris.
Parties were sworn.
Proof of Service on file.
Parties met and conferred. Parties agreed by stipulation to an Elder Adult Abuse Restraining Order with no factual findings made by the court.
Court GRANTED Elder Adult Abuse Restraining Order as requested. (SEE SCANNED ORDER)
Expires Nov 07, 2015.
Order signed in open court.

NOTICE OF NEW HEARING DATE AND ORDER ON REISSUANCE (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-10-2012 Continued To Nov-07-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Morris for and with Edgar Leung (Respondent). Mrs. Leung is present. Akiko Takeshita for Mrs. Xie (Petitioner).

The Court disclosed that the Court Reporter knows Mr. Leung and that she has provided a witness statement for Mr. Leung. Both Counsel have no problem with that and agreed to go forward.

The Court noted that during the last hearing, Mr. Yee (former counsel for Mr. Leung) requested to have this matter to be heard with CCH-12-573813 Leung vs. Ding in Dept. 514 on October 3, 2012. This Court has conferred with Dept. 514 and found that the two cases raised the same issues, same facts and have the same witnesses and that case was continued from October 3, 2012 to November 7, 2012 in Dept. 514. Ms. Takeshita stated her reason for objecting to the transfer to Dept. 514. Mr. Morris stated that the consolidation makes prefect sense and that he has problem serving Mrs. Xie. The Court continued the Request for Restraining Order to November 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514. TRO is reissued. (Notice of New Hearing Date and Order on Reissuance signed in open court). Both parties were given a copy of the order and no further service is necessary.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7707. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

NOTICE OF COURT HEARING (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-19-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Peter Busch, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077, Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

Akiko Takeshita, for and with Hui Oiong Xie, Petitioner, who was assisted in English/Cantonese translation by Court Certified Interpreter Anthony Tam.
Miao Qiong Chan, witness for the Petitioner.

Andrew Yee, for and with Edgar Leung, Respondent.
Sandy Leung, witness for the Respondent.

Peter Fitzpatrick, for Ying Deng (Ding), not present.

All parties and witnesses were sworn prior to the commencement of the proceedings.

Mr. Yee requested a continuance of the matter. There being no opposition by Ms. Takeshita, the matter was continued to October 10, 2012 at 1:30 p.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Yee informed the Court that his client also filed a restraining order in a separate matter which is set for hearing on October 3, 2012 in Department 514. Discussions regarding the parties possibly participating in mediation and the related pending restraining order in Department 514 were held.

TRO reissued.
